title: Tick 7: Cloudflare Workers Builds MCP audit for outcomes-mcp pre-deploy state
question: Does a Cloudflare Worker named outcomes-mcp exist in the operator's account today and if so what is its build history?
success_criteria: workers_list query against account e6294e3ea89f8207af387d459824aaae returns the full 15-worker inventory and is captured in the runroc
no worker named outcomes-mcp or any outcomes prefix variant is present which establishes the pre-deploy baseline that C2 will change
runroc outcomes runrocs C1-builds json records the empty builds history with an explicit interpretation pointing at C2 as the next Track C step

capabilities: workers_list MCP call returned the 15-worker inventory for the active account
absence of an outcomes-mcp worker confirmed before C2 wrangler deploy runs
runroc artifact captures the pre-deploy baseline so C2 can be diffed against it
